description: Financial data including DAO ledger transactions, compensation, budgets, and spending
notes: Ledger CSV sourced from ens-ledger.app, annotated by 0xLighthouse (https://github.com/0xLighthouse/ens-ledger-analysis)

ens_ledger_transactions.csv.description: ENS DAO ledger transactions — all wallet spending with categories, amounts, and USD values

schema_hints.Value: float (USD value at time of transaction)

provenance.notes: Raw CSV downloaded from ens-ledger.app, part of 0xLighthouse/ens-ledger-analysis repo. Contains 2,315 annotated transactions across 11 wallets, 449 unique recipients, $264M total USD value. Reports and plots available in docs/references/lighthouse-ledger-analysis/
provenance.query_or_method: sentinel check — file already on disk

enswallets.json.description: ENS DAO wallet registry — operational contracts, endowment, and working group multisigs with addresses, multisig configs, and signers

schema_hints.operational_contracts[]: name, ens_name, address, description, type, balances
schema_hints.working_group_multisigs[]: name, ens_name, address, working_group, type, multisig_config, balances

provenance.notes: Wallet addresses sourced from ens-dashboard, multisig configs and balances from ENS DAO dashboard

ens_wallet_balances.json.description: Fresh ETH/ENS/USDC balances for all ENS DAO wallets, fetched from Safe Transaction Service

compensation.json.description: ENS DAO compensation payments — salaries, streams, fellowships, and gas reimbursements extracted from the ENS ledger

schema_hints.value_usd: float (USD value at time of transaction)
schema_hints.category: string (Salaries | Stream | Fellowship | Steward Gas Ref. | Delegate Gas Ref.)

provenance.query_or_method: Filter rows where Category in {Salaries, Stream, Fellowship, Steward Gas Ref., Delegate Gas Ref.}
provenance.notes: Derived from ledger. Salaries: 384 txns, Stream: 196 txns, Fellowship: 9 txns, Steward Gas Ref.: 7 txns, Delegate Gas Ref.: 3 txns. Total: 599 records.

ens_safe_transactions.json.description: Multisig transaction history for all ENS DAO Safe wallets — tagged with working group, category, direction

schema_hints.fields: safe_address, safe_name, safe_ens_name, working_group, tx_hash, direction, token, amount, to_address, from_address, category, description, date, nonce, block_number
